title: [SDB] Define ParameterDefinition schema and Python dataclasses
body:
## Objective
Implement the core ParameterDefinition schema covering all fields needed for spacecraft parameter management.

## Acceptance Criteria
- ParameterDefinition dataclass: name, description, unit, dtype, valid_range, classification, domain, model_id, pus
- PusMapping dataclass: apid, service, subservice, parameter_id
- Classification enum: TM, TC
- Domain enum: EPS, AOCS, TTC, OBDH, THERMAL
- All fields typed, frozen dataclasses
- mypy strict clean
- Unit tests cover construction and validation

## Implements
SVF-DEV-090

title: [SDB] Implement YAML schema and Python SRDB loader
body:
## Objective
Implement a YAML schema for parameter definitions and a Python loader that parses YAML into typed ParameterDefinition objects with validation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- YAML schema documented and versioned
- SrdbLoader class parses YAML into dict[str, ParameterDefinition]
- Schema validation: missing required fields raise descriptive errors
- Duplicate parameter names raise errors
- Invalid classification/domain values raise errors
- Unit tests cover valid load, missing fields, duplicates, invalid values

## Implements
SVF-DEV-092

title: [SDB] Write domain baseline YAML files (EPS, AOCS, TTC, OBDH, Thermal)
body:
## Objective
Provide baseline parameter definitions for five spacecraft domains.

## Acceptance Criteria
- srdb/baseline/eps.yaml: battery, solar array, PCDU parameters
- srdb/baseline/aocs.yaml: attitude, angular rates, actuator commands
- srdb/baseline/ttc.yaml: transponder, antenna, link parameters
- srdb/baseline/obdh.yaml: OBC health, memory, mode management
- srdb/baseline/thermal.yaml: temperature sensors, heater commands
- All existing EPS FMU parameters covered in eps.yaml
- All files load cleanly via SrdbLoader
- PUS mappings consistent with ECSS PUS-C service catalogue

## Implements
SVF-DEV-091

title: [SDB] Implement mission-level YAML override support
body:
## Objective
Allow mission-specific YAML files to override or extend domain baselines without modifying them.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SrdbLoader accepts a mission YAML file in addition to baseline files
- Mission file can override valid_range, description, PUS mappings
- Mission file can add new parameters not in baselines
- Mission file cannot change classification (TM/TC) of baseline parameters
- srdb/missions/example_mission.yaml provided as reference
- Unit tests cover override, extension, and illegal classification change

## Implements
SVF-DEV-093

title: [SDB] Wire SRDB into ParameterStore for runtime validation
body:
## Objective
ParameterStore optionally accepts an SRDB instance and validates writes against parameter definitions at runtime.

## Acceptance Criteria
- ParameterStore accepts optional Srdb instance at construction
- write() issues warning when value outside valid_range
- write() issues warning when writing to a TC-classified parameter
- CommandStore.inject() issues warning when injecting to a TM-classified parameter
- Warnings logged via Python logging, never raise exceptions
- Unit tests cover range violation, TM write, TC read warnings

## Implements
SVF-DEV-094, SVF-DEV-095

title: [SDB] Implement XTCE export adapter
body:
## Objective
Export the SRDB to XTCE 1.2 format for interoperability with ground segment tools (YAMCS, SCOS-2000, etc.).

## Acceptance Criteria
- XtceExporter class serialises Srdb to valid XTCE 1.2 XML
- Covers: SpaceSystem, TelemetryMetaData, CommandMetaData
- Parameter types, valid ranges, and PUS mappings exported
- Output validated against XTCE 1.2 schema
- Integration test exports EPS baseline and validates output

## Implements
SVF-DEV-097

title: [SDB] Implement MIB import adapter
body:
## Objective
Import an existing Mission Information Base (MIB) file into the SRDB, enabling migration from legacy ground segment databases.

## Acceptance Criteria
- MibImporter class parses MIB format into ParameterDefinition objects
- Covers pcf.dat (parameter calibration), plf.dat (parameter location), ccf.dat (command)
- Unmappable fields logged as warnings, not errors
- Integration test imports a sample MIB and validates key parameters

## Implements
SVF-DEV-098
